message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'postproc_build_desc_ring' sets signal field 'postproc_comp_entry.token', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=postproc_comp_entry;field=token;offset=8] [oracle:assert=postproc_comp_entry.token stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets token without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
